title: Claude Fable 5 + YouTube = $30,000/mo
summary: A YouTube automation system combining Claude Code Fable 5, Higsfield CLI, and Auphonic to create and edit video content at low cost. The pipeline involves reverse-engineering successful channels, writing scripts, recording voice-overs, and using Claude to automatically edit videos together into finished YouTube content.
writeup: Jack Roberts demonstrates a "ZeroEdit" video production pipeline that uses Claude Fable 5 Code as an editing engine to automate YouTube video creation. The system deconstructs successful channels, writes scripts, records voiceover, and integrates with the Higsfield CLI to handle full video assembly at roughly $2 per video. The framing connects this workflow to a $30,000 per month revenue target, positioning Claude as the orchestration layer rather than a manual editing step.
